query:
SELECT phone, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(id) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(name) as names
FROM teachers
WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != ''
GROUP BY phone
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT phone, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(id) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(name) as names
FROM teachers
